{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Remnant's tail
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] finished digesting the [[Remnant's tail]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
